slogans: Stay solid. Don't give them anything.
Defend with purpose. Make them work.
Stay in the point. Extend the rally.
Be patient. Wait for your opportunity.
Stay consistent. Make them beat you.
Defend with precision. Every shot counts.
Stay focused. Don't give up the point.
Defend with heart. Show your toughness.
Defend with patience. Your time will come.
Stay resilient. Defend like a champion.
